title: Ales Mouse Trap, Reusable Snap Traps, High Sensitive Mouse Catcher, Rodent Trap, Mice Kill Mouse Control, Instantly Quick Response, Safe for Family and Pets
features: 【POWERFUL & EFFECTIVE】- With the strong and sensitive spring built in, our mice catcher is extremely effective, they can catch the mice with strong force and very quick response speed so mice will suffer less pain to die.

【CATCH MORE WITH STRONGER POWER】- Our Snap Traps are made of durable polystyrene and strong steel, sturdy and have powerful snap, no plastic odor. Strong spring construction is powerful with quick response, kill fast and give mice a humane death, no more pain.

【REUSABLE & LONG LASTING】- Our Mouse Traps can be used many times, when catching a mouse, just get rid of it, and wash the trap with soap water, then it can be used again! So you can achieve multiple catches all year round, cost-effective and save money!

【SIMPLE DESIGN & EASY TO SET】- Just put the baits (peanut butter is better)into the preformed bait cup, lock the metal strip to the back pedestal, place it next to corner where mice often hang out. Then just wait the critters to be caught, no worries!

【QUICK RESPONSE & ENVIRONMENTALLY FRIENDLY】- No mouse poison, free of toxic and harmful chemicals, our Rodent Traps response quickly, kill fast, no more struggle, no more pain. They perform better than wooden traps, electric mouse trap, glue sticky pads, ultrasonic repeller. Safe for family and pets.
description: Product Description Aopaeoie Mouse Trap 6 Pack Aopaeoie Mouse Traps provide you with a quicker way to get rid of mice! Advice for Baits Do NOT use “take away” baits like ham, better to use ropy baits like peanut butter, chocolate spread, spreading in the bait cup, so mice need to draw near to lick, increasing the probability of catching. WARNINGS 1. Please handle with care at all times, avoid pinching fingers. 2. Please keep it away from children, pets and non-target animals, the force can be sharp.
